Quick Counter.name: Quick Counter
Quick Counter.description: High defensive line with aggressive passing and rapid vertical transitions. Focuses on winning the ball back quickly and exploiting spaces left by the opposition.

Possession Game.name: Possession Game
Possession Game.description: Patient, short-passing build-up focusing on keeping the ball and controlling the tempo of the game.

Long Ball Counter.name: Long Ball Counter
Long Ball Counter.description: Deep defensive block that denies space behind, looking to hit fast counters.

Out Wide.name: Out Wide
Out Wide.description: Attacking focus down the flanks with frequent crosses into the penalty box.

Long Ball.name: Long Ball
Long Ball.description: Direct, bypass-midfield playstyle aiming long passes to target forwards.
